official_name_local: mk:Република Северна Македонија; sq:Republika e Maqedonisë së Veriut
flag_description_en: A red field with a stylized yellow sun in the centre, with eight broadening rays extending from the central disc to the edges of the field.
verification_notes: Сите три извори се согласуваат на дизајнот, авторот и пропорциите на знамето. Споредна контрадикција: повеќето извори (FOTW, worldflag.org, CIA-State.gov, Wikipedia/EN) посочуваат датум на усвојување

flag_description_en: Thirteen equal horizontal stripes of red (top and bottom) alternating with white; a blue rectangle in the upper hoist-side corner bears 50 small white five-pointed stars arranged in nine offset horizontal rows of six stars (top and bottom) alternating with rows of five stars. The 50 stars represent the 50 states; the 13 stripes represent the 13 original colonies.
anthem_composer: John Stafford Smith (melody, originally 'To Anacreon in Heaven')
verification_notes: Сите три извори (CIA World Factbook, U.S. State Department, 4 U.S.C. кодификација) се целосно согласни на сите јадрени полиња.

flag_description_en: Red field with a large yellow five-pointed star and four smaller yellow five-pointed stars (arranged in a vertical arc toward the centre of the flag) in the upper hoist-side corner. Red represents the revolution; the stars symbolise the four social classes united under the Communist Party of China, with the larger star representing the leadership of the CCP.
coa_designer: Lin Huiyin and design team, Tsinghua University.
verification_notes: Сите три извори се целосно согласни. Забелешка: CIA Factbook 2023 archive го документира националниот симбол; PRC Constitution (Chapter IV) ги дава уставните рамки; NPC дава полна правна структура.

flag_description_en: Three equal horizontal bands of black (top), red (middle), and gold (bottom). Proportion 3:5. The colours trace back to the uniforms of German soldiers during the Napoleonic Wars and were established by the Weimar Republic; readopted by the Federal Republic in 1949.
flag_designer: Tradition (Weimar Republic, 1919, after the colours of the Lützow Free Corps, 1813).
anthem_title_local: Deutschlandlied (Das Lied der Deutschen) — dritte Strophe
anthem_title_en: Song of Germany — third stanza only
coa_designer: Tobias Schwab (Weimar version, 1928); confirmed 20 January 1950 by Federal President Theodor Heuss.

flag_description_en: A green field with a large yellow rhombus in the centre, bearing a blue disc which forms a celestial globe depicting 27 small white five-pointed stars spanned by a white equatorial curved band with the national motto 'Ordem e Progresso' (Order and Progress) written in green. The 27 stars represent the 26 federal states and the Federal District; their positions reproduce the southern sky over Rio de Janeiro on the morning of the Proclamation of the Republic, 15 November 1889.
flag_designer: Raimundo Teixeira Mendes (with Manuel Pereira Reis, Miguel Lemos, Décio Villares).
coa_designer: Artur Zauer (original design); updated by Lei 8.421/1992.
